problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: The key to Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? is BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis — specifically BDNF upregulation to — which would help 21,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
